title: hieracium murorum subsp. valentius
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. valentius is a subspecies of the lesser hawk's-beard plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. Hieracium murorum subsp. valentius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
